name: refarm
description: Refarm — Personal Operating System for sovereign data management

scripts.test:capabilities: npm --prefix packages/storage-contract-v1 run test:unit && npm --prefix packages/sync-contract-v1 run test:unit && npm --prefix packages/identity-contract-v1 run test:unit && npm --prefix packages/plugin-manifest run test:conformance && npm --prefix packages/storage-sqlite run test:conformance && npm --prefix packages/storage-memory run test:conformance && npm --prefix packages/storage-rest run test:conformance && npm --prefix packages/sync-loro run test:conformance && npm --prefix packages/sync-crdt run test:conformance && npm --prefix packages/identity-nostr run test:conformance
scripts.gate:smoke:foundation: npm --prefix packages/cli run type-check && npm --prefix packages/config run test && npm --prefix packages/toolbox run test && npm --prefix packages/vtconfig run test
scripts.gate:smoke:runtime: cd packages/tractor && cargo check --quiet && cargo test --lib agent_tools_bridge --quiet && cargo test --lib plugin_host --quiet && cargo test --lib wasi_bridge --quiet && npm run test:smoke:ws && cd ../.. && npm --prefix packages/tractor-ts run build && npm --prefix packages/tractor-ts run type-check && npm --prefix packages/tractor-ts run runtime-module:ci
scripts.gate:smoke:contracts: npm --prefix packages/storage-contract-v1 run build && npm --prefix packages/storage-contract-v1 run test:unit && npm --prefix packages/sync-contract-v1 run build && npm --prefix packages/sync-contract-v1 run test:unit && npm --prefix packages/identity-contract-v1 run build && npm --prefix packages/identity-contract-v1 run test:unit && npm --prefix packages/storage-sqlite run build && npm --prefix packages/storage-sqlite run test:conformance && npm --prefix packages/sync-loro run build && npm --prefix packages/sync-loro run test:conformance
scripts.gate:full:colony: npm run gate:smoke:foundation && npm run gate:smoke:contracts && npm run gate:smoke:runtime && npm run project:validate --silent
scripts.test:repro: npm run lint && npm run type-check && npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e
scripts.agent:lsp:check: cd packages/tractor && cargo test --lib lsp_bridge --quiet && cargo test --test pi_agent_harness --no-run
scripts.agent:lsp:harness: cd packages/tractor && timeout 90 cargo test --test pi_agent_harness harness_tool_use_dispatched_and_result_fed_back -- --ignored --test-threads=1 --nocapture && timeout 90 cargo test --test pi_agent_harness harness_find_references_tool_reads_lsp_locations -- --ignored --test-threads=1 --nocapture && timeout 90 cargo test --test pi_agent_harness harness_rename_symbol_tool_updates_workspace_file_via_lsp -- --ignored --test-threads=1 --nocapture
scripts.agent:lsp:harness:build: cd packages/pi-agent && cargo component build --release && cd ../.. && npm run agent:lsp:harness
scripts.agent:streaming:check: cd packages/pi-agent && cargo check --target wasm32-wasip1 --quiet && cargo test --lib streaming_config --quiet && cargo test --lib provider_runtime_stream_body_gate --quiet && cd ../tractor && cargo check --quiet && cargo test --lib read_sse_data_events_limited --quiet && cargo test --lib complete_http_stream --quiet && cargo test --lib store_stream_agent_response_chunks_from_reader --quiet
scripts.agent:streaming:clients: npm --prefix packages/tractor-ts run type-check && npm --prefix packages/tractor-ts run test:unit -- agent-response-stream.test.ts stream-chunk.test.ts stream-session.test.ts stream-view.test.ts
scripts.agent:streaming:studio: npm --prefix packages/homestead test && npm --prefix packages/homestead run type-check && npm --prefix apps/dev test && npm --prefix apps/dev run type-check
scripts.agent:streaming:harness: cd packages/tractor && cargo test --test pi_agent_harness harness_streaming -- --ignored --test-threads=1
scripts.agent:streaming:harness:build: cd packages/pi-agent && cargo component build --release -p pi-agent && cd ../.. && npm run agent:streaming:harness

//: jest is kept for type-safety/compatibility with certain node_modules in vitest runs
